7. The export (sketchSheetExport.js)
8. The persistence (sketchDeserialize.js)

Perfect! I now have a comprehensive understanding of the sketch module. Let me compile the complete report:

## Sketch Module Comprehensive Exploration Report

I've thoroughly explored the sketch module at `/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/modules/sketch/` and mapped all 31 files. Here's the complete analysis:

---

### **1. FILE STRUCTURE & ORGANIZATION**

```
src/modules/sketch/
├── index.js (entry point)
├── SketchWorkspace.jsx (main layout container)
├── app/
│   ├── SketchProvider.jsx (state management - parts, assemblies)
│   └── SketchEditorProvider.jsx (UI state - tools, viewport, selection)
├── domain/
│   ├── partModels.js (part factory functions)
│   ├── sketchModels.js (sketch project factory)
│   ├── viewProjection.js (3D→2D projection math)
│   ├── assemblyModels.js (assembly factory & utilities)
│   ├── partDefaults.js (defaults & option lists)
│   ├── defaults.js (constants: tools, zoom, grid)
│   └── demoObject.js (demo table generator)
├── editor/
│   ├── tools.js (tool shortcuts)
│   └── handlers/
│       ├── selectHandler.js (selection & drag)
│       ├── partPlaceHandler.js (draw parts)
│       └── dimensionHandler.js (add dimensions)
├── renderers/
│   ├── SketchCanvas.jsx (main SVG canvas, event handlers)
│   ├── PartRenderer.jsx (renders single part)
│   ├── DimensionRenderer.jsx (renders dimension with arrows)
│   ├── GridRenderer.jsx (infinite grid pattern)
│   ├── SketchPreviewPanel.jsx (3D Three.js preview)
│   └── buildSketchPreview.js (3D mesh generation)
├── ui/
│   ├── SketchToolbar.jsx (tools, views, display toggles)
│   ├── SketchSidebar.jsx (assemblies & parts layers)
│   ├── SketchPropertiesPanel.jsx (part property editor)
│   └── SketchEmptyState.jsx (welcome overlay)
├── persistence/
│   ├── sketchStorage.js (public API)
│   ├── sketchLocalStorageBackend.js (browser storage)
│   ├── sketchSerialize.js (JSON encoder)
│   └── sketchDeserialize.js (JSON decoder)
└── export/
    └── sketchSheetExport.js (SVG sheet export)
```

---

### **2. DOMAIN MODELS**

#### **partModels.js** - Part Factory Functions
**Key Functions:**
- `createPartBase(type, overrides)` - Base constructor with ID, position, rotation, styling
- `createPanel(overrides)` - 600×400×18mm plywood panel
- `createLeg(overrides)` - 40×40×720mm leg with square/round/tapered profiles
- `createFrame(overrides)` - Frame with configurable axis (x/y)
- `createCutout(overrides)` - Subtractive feature, requires parentId
- `createHole(overrides)` - Circular hole, requires parentId
- `createDimension(overrides)` - Dimension with start/endPoint, offset, textOverride

**Part Structure:**
```javascript
{
  id: 'part_m1abc_1',
  type: 'panel|leg|frame|cutout|hole|dimension',
  name: string,
  assemblyId: null | string,
  parentId: null | string (for cutouts/holes),
  position: { x, y, z },  // millimeters
  rotation: { x, y, z },
  fill: rgba|'none',
  stroke: color,
  strokeWidth: number,
  // Type-specific properties...
}
```

#### **sketchModels.js** - Project Factory
- `createSketchProject(name)` - Creates sketch project with A4 landscape canvas (297000×210000mm)
- `createAnnotation(type, props)` - Creates annotation object (dimension, label, callout)

**Project Structure:**
```javascript
{
  id: 'sketch_...',
  name, description, category,
  canvasWidth: 297000,   // A4 landscape
  canvasHeight: 210000,
  parts: [],
  assemblies: [],
  annotations: [],
  sheets: [],
  createdAt, updatedAt
}
```

#### **viewProjection.js** - 3D ↔ 2D Conversion
**Core Functions:**
- `getPartExtents(part)` - Gets width/depth/height for each part type
- `projectPartToView(part, view)` - Converts 3D part → 2D SVG coords for 'top'|'front'|'side' view
- `viewToModelPosition(svgX, svgY, view)` - Inverse: converts SVG coords → 3D position
- `viewToModelExtents(svgW, svgH, view, partType)` - Converts 2D size → 3D dimensions based on view & type
- `getViewLabel(view)` - Returns display label

**Views:**
- **'top'**: X–Y plane (looking down at Z)
- **'front'**: X–Z plane (looking from Y)
- **'side'**: Y–Z plane (looking from X)

#### **assemblyModels.js**
- `createAssembly(name, overrides)` - Groups parts (with partIds array, description, category)
- `addPartToAssembly(assembly, partId)` - Adds part to assembly
- `removePartFromAssembly(assembly, partId)` - Removes part from assembly

#### **partDefaults.js** & **defaults.js**
- **MATERIAL_OPTIONS**: plywood, mdf, particleboard, hardwood, softwood, metal
- **LEG_PROFILE_OPTIONS**: square, round, tapered
- **FRAME_AXIS_OPTIONS**: x (left-right), y (front-back)
- **SKETCH_TOOLS**: select, panel, leg, frame, cutout, hole, dimension
- **Zoom**: default 0.15, min 0.02, max 3.0, factor 1.1
- **Grid**: minor 50mm, major 1000mm

---

### **3. EDITOR HANDLERS**

#### **selectHandler.js** - Selection & Dragging
**Behavior:**
- Performs hitTest with 6px tolerance (scaled by zoom)
- Iterates parts in reverse (top-most first)
- On drag: updates position based on active view
  - 'top': updates x, y
  - 'front': updates x, z (inverted)
  - 'side': updates y, z (inverted)
- Delete/Backspace key deletes selected part

#### **partPlaceHandler.js** - Part Placement (Drag-to-Draw)
**Behavior:**
- Checks if part needs parent (cutout/hole) and validates selection
- Drag from start to end point
- Minimum 10mm in each dimension
- Converts SVG coords → model position/extents via viewProjection
- Dispatches PART_ADD, optional ASSEMBLY_ADD_PART
- Escape key cancels
- Shows status message with dimensions

#### **dimensionHandler.js** - Dimension Creation
**Behavior:**
- Two-click interaction: first click sets startPoint, second creates dimension
- Converts points to 3D via viewToModelPosition
- Offset fixed at 200mm
- Uses `createDimensionFigure` from @/annotations/dimensions for rendering

---

### **4. RENDERERS**

#### **SketchCanvas.jsx** - Main SVG Canvas & Input Handling
**Structure:**
- SVG with transform group: `translate(panX, panY) scale(zoom)`
- Event handlers: mouseDown/Move/Up for tools, wheel for zoom
- Space+click for panning (middle-mouse alternative)
- Keyboard shortcuts from SKETCH_TOOL_SHORTCUTS

**Rendering Order (z-order):**
1. Grid (GridRenderer)
2. Canvas boundary (dashed rect)
3. Parts (PartRenderer for each non-dimension)
4. Dimensions (DimensionRenderer)
5. Draw preview (dragging rect)
6. Dimension first-click indicator (circle)

**Status Bar Shows:**
- Active view label
- Cursor position (X, Y, Z mm)
- Zoom percentage
- Active tool name

#### **PartRenderer.jsx** - Single Part Rendering
**Logic:**
- Projects part to view using `projectPartToView`
- Renders rect for most parts, ellipse for holes in top view
- Subtractive (cutout/hole): dashed stroke, gray fill
- Selection: dashed border (scaled by zoom)
- Holes: `<ellipse>` instead of `<rect>`

#### **DimensionRenderer.jsx** - Dimension with Arrows
**Features:**
- Projects start/endPoint to 2D using `projectDimensionPoint`
- Uses `createDimensionFigure` from @/annotations/dimensions
- Renders extension lines, dimension line, arrowheads, text label
- Text rotated to align with dimension line
- `vectorEffect="non-scaling-stroke"` for zoom-independence

#### **GridRenderer.jsx** - Infinite Grid Pattern
- Nested SVG patterns: minor (50mm) and major (1000mm)
- Fills large rect beyond canvas bounds
- Uses CSS variables: `--color-grid-minor`, `--color-grid-major`

#### **SketchPreviewPanel.jsx** - 3D Three.js Preview
- Uses `createPreviewViewport` from @/three/viewer
- Builds scene with `buildSketchPreviewRoot`
- Orbit controls, zoom via scroll
- ResizeObserver for responsive canvas
- Highlights selected part with SELECTED_TINT color (0xB8860B)

#### **buildSketchPreview.js** - 3D Mesh Generation
**Mesh Creation:**
- **Panel**: BoxGeometry(width, thickness, depth)
- **Leg**: BoxGeometry (or CylinderGeometry if round profile)
- **Frame**: BoxGeometry with axis-dependent dimensions
- Skips: dimension, cutout, hole in V1

**Materials:**
- MeshStandardMaterial: roughness 0.7, metalness 0.05
- Wood color: 0xD2B48C
- Selected tint: 0xB8860B
- Edges: black lines at 0.3 opacity

---

### **5. UI COMPONENTS**

#### **SketchToolbar.jsx**
**Sections:**
- **Undo/Redo** buttons (disabled if can't)
- **Tool Palette**: cursor, panel (P), leg (G), frame (F), cutout (C), hole (H), dimension (M)
- **View Switcher**: Top, Front, Side buttons
- **Display Toggles**: Grid (eye icon), Snap (magnet icon)
- **Export**: Download SVG sheet button

#### **SketchSidebar.jsx**
**Sections:**
- **Assemblies Panel**: Add assembly (+), delete, show part count, click to filter
- **Parts Panel**: Shows parts filtered by active assembly or all
- Each item: type badge (colored), name, delete button

**Type Colors:**
- panel: #B8860B (gold)
- leg: #6B8E23 (olive)
- frame: #4682B4 (steel blue)
- cutout: #CD5C5C (coral)
- hole: #9370DB (purple)
- dimension: #708090 (gray)

#### **SketchPropertiesPanel.jsx**
**Sections (if part selected):**
1. **Name**: text input
2. **Type**: badge display
3. **Position**: X, Y, Z number inputs
4. **Dimensions**: type-specific fields (Width, Depth, Height, Material, Profile, Axis)
5. **Style**: Fill & stroke color pickers
6. **Assembly**: display assembly name or "None"

#### **SketchEmptyState.jsx**
- Overlay with welcome message
- "Start Drawing" button (sets tool to 'panel')
- "Try Demo Object" button (loads demo table)

---

### **6. PROVIDERS & STATE MANAGEMENT**

#### **SketchProvider.jsx** - Data State (Parts, Assemblies)
**State Structure:**
```javascript
{
  project: { ...sketch project },
  isDirty: boolean,
  savedSnapshot: string (JSON),
  history: [project1, project2, ...],  // HISTORY_LIMIT = 80
  future: [project1, project2, ...],   // for redo
}
```

**Actions:**
- `SKETCH_NEW` / `SKETCH_LOAD` - Load project
- `PART_ADD` / `PART_UPDATE` / `PART_DELETE`
- `ASSEMBLY_ADD` / `ASSEMBLY_UPDATE` / `ASSEMBLY_DELETE`
- `ASSEMBLY_ADD_PART` / `ASSEMBLY_REMOVE_PART`
- `ANNOTATION_ADD` / `ANNOTATION_UPDATE` / `ANNOTATION_DELETE`
- `PROJECT_UPDATE_META` - Update name, description, etc.
- `UNDO` / `REDO`
- `MARK_SAVED`

**Helper Functions:**
- `getPart(partId)` - Find part by ID
- `getAssembly(assemblyId)` - Find assembly
- `getPartsForAssembly(assemblyId)` - Filter parts
- `getChildParts(parentId)` - Get cutouts/holes for a panel

#### **SketchEditorProvider.jsx** - UI State (Tools, Selection, Viewport)
**State Structure:**
```javascript
{
  activeTool: 'select'|'panel'|'leg'|...,
  selectedId: null | string,
  selectedType: 'part'|'assembly'|null,
  toolState: {},           // tool-specific state (drawing, startPos, etc.)
  viewport: { panX, panY, zoom },
  activeView: 'top'|'front'|'side',
  activeAssemblyId: null | string,
  showGrid: boolean,
  snapEnabled: boolean,
  statusMessage: null | string,
  emptyStateDismissed: boolean,
}
```

**Actions:**
- `SET_TOOL` - Change active tool (clears selection & toolState)
- `SELECT_OBJECT` / `DESELECT`
- `UPDATE_TOOL_STATE`
- `PAN` / `ZOOM` / `SET_VIEWPORT`
- `SET_VIEW` - Switch to top/front/side
- `SET_ACTIVE_ASSEMBLY`
- `TOGGLE_GRID` / `TOGGLE_SNAP`
- `SET_STATUS_MESSAGE` / `CLEAR_STATUS_MESSAGE` (auto-clears after 2.5s)
- `DISMISS_EMPTY_STATE`

---

### **7. PERSISTENCE**

#### **sketchStorage.js** - Public API
```javascript
saveSketchProject(project)      // Serialize + save to localStorage
loadSketchProject(id)            // Load from localStorage + deserialize
listSketchProjects()             // List all saved projects (index only)
deleteSketchProject(id)          // Delete from localStorage
```

#### **sketchLocalStorageBackend.js** - Browser Storage
- **Index Key**: `'sketch-planner-projects'` (array of {id, name, savedAt})
- **Project Key**: `'sketch-planner-project-' + projectId`
- Stores full serialized JSON in localStorage
- Auto-updates index on save/delete

#### **sketchSerialize.js** & **sketchDeserialize.js**
```javascript
// Serialize
{
  schemaType: 'sketch',
  schemaVersion: 1,
  data: { ...project },
  savedAt: ISO string
}

// Deserialize: extracts project from data field, validates required fields
```

---

### **8. EXPORT**

#### **sketchSheetExport.js** - Sheet Export
**Function: `exportSketchSvg(project)`**
- **Paper**: A4 landscape (210×297mm)
- **Layout**: 3 views side-by-side (top, front, side)
- **Margin**: 15mm
- **Scale**: Uniform scale to fit all views within available area
- **SVG Output**: White background, page border, title block with date, view labels

**Features:**
- Filters out dimensions during export
- Renders holes as ellipse, others as rect
- Dashed stroke for subtractive parts
- Line stroke width: 0.3mm

**Download Function:**
- Creates Blob, opens download dialog
- Filename: `{projectName}-sheet.svg`

---

### **9. KEY ENTRY POINT & LAYOUT**

#### **SketchWorkspace.jsx**
**Layout Grid:**
```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
│         SketchToolbar                   │
├────────┬─────────────────┬──────────────┤
│        │                 │   Properties │
│Sidebar │  SketchCanvas   │   Panel      │
│        │                 │   -------    │
│        │                 │   3D Preview │
└────────┴─────────────────┴──────────────┘
```

**Auto-save**: 5-second debounce on isDirty flag, marks saved when done

---

### **10. KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS**

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| V | Select tool |
| P | Panel tool |
| G | Leg tool |
| F | Frame tool |
| C | Cutout tool |
| H | Hole tool |
| M | Dimension tool |
| Escape | Cancel tool, deselect |
| Delete/Backspace | Delete selected part |
| Space | Grab/pan mode (+ mouse button) |
| Scroll | Zoom in/out |
| Middle-click | Pan |

---

### **SUMMARY**

The sketch module is a **complete 2D CAD system for furniture design** with:
- **6 part types** (panel, leg, frame, cutout, hole) + dimensions
- **3 orthographic views** (top, front, side) with real-time projection math
- **Full undo/redo** with 80-level history
- **Assembly grouping** for complex objects
- **3D preview** using Three.js
- **SVG export** to A4 sheets
- **localStorage persistence** with indexing
- **Responsive toolbar, sidebar, properties panel**
- **Status messages & empty state**

All coordinates are in **millimeters**, with SVG canvas using **translate+scale transforms** for pan/zoom. The architecture cleanly separates **domain models**, **state management** (two contexts), **handlers** (tool pattern), and **renderers** (SVG + Three.js).
